reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Homoeopathic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Great campus, great faculty, enjoyable atmosphere, and great career ahead .

review_content.Placements: My batch of students have been paced to save college for a paid internship. As a government college for one year, you get INR 12000 per month and after that, my batch mates and seniors got a chance in the teaching career with a package of INR 10 LPA as a fresher as a starting salary.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good, college buildings are well developed with all the facility mess and canteen food is average. OPD is well-run, with hundreds of patients visiting daily, providing ample opportunity for learning and practice. Sports and cultural activities are also included in the biggest cultural programme on April 10th, celebrated as Hahnemann Day. The celebration starts on April 1st, which includes sporting cultural activities.

description: The State Homoeopathic Medical College and Hospital BHMS Cutoff 2024 has been released for Round 3. The cutoff for the BHMS was released as opening and closing ranks for General, OBC, SC, ST, EWS and PWD categories. According to Round 3 State Homoeopathic Medical College and Hospital AYUSH NEET UG cutoff 2024, for the AI quota, closing rank for General category students was 154189. The most sought-after course as per the cutoff list is Bachelor of Homoeopathic Medicine and Surgery.

State Homoeopathic Medical College and Hospital cutoff 2024 has been released, for it's third round for the candidates seeking admission to the NEET UG course. As per the AYUSH NEET UG Round 3 Seat Allotment Result, the most competitive course was Bachelor of Homoeopathic Medicine and Surgery with a cutoff rank of 154189 for the students belonging to the General AI category.

NEET UG 2024 AYUSH counselling is held for admission to undergraduate courses in Ayurveda, Unani, Siddha, and Homeopathy. The students are selected based on valid NEET ranks. AYUSH NEET UG schedule for 2024 is mentioned in the table below for the candidates seeking admission to NEET courses.

State Homoeopathic Medical College and Hospital admission to the UG courses is based on valid AYUSH NEET UG ranks, followed by a counselling round. A direct link will be provided below to download the counselling result for AYUSH NEET 2024 counselling.

faqs.question: Does S.D. College of Pharmacy and Vocational Studies provide good placement facilities?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: S.D. College of Pharmacy and Vocational Studies offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.Pharma and D.Pharma. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.Pharma. S.D. College of Pharmacy and Vocational Studies courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for S.D. College of Pharmacy and Vocational Studies courses stands around INR 1,00,200 to 2,82,000.

faqs.answer: A:    S.D. College of Pharmacy and Vocational Studies offers Degree and Diploma courses including 2 UG and 2 PG courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. S.D. College of Pharmacy and Vocational Studies has specializations such as M.Pharma specializations in Pharmacognosy, Pharmaceutical.
faqs.question: Which major specializations are available at S.D. College of Pharmacy and Vocational Studies?

faqs.answer: A:    Courses offered by S.D. College of Pharmacy and Vocational Studies are D.Pharma, M.Pharma, B.Pharma. These courses are in the stream of Medicine & Health Sciences. S.D. College of Pharmacy and Vocational Studies offers specializations such as M.Pharma specializations in Pharmacognosy, Pharmaceutical.
faqs.question: Which courses does S.D. College of Pharmacy and Vocational Studies offer to students?

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: East or west S. D college of pharmacy and vocational studies is the best college.

review_content.Placements: 60% of students get good placements from the college campus. The minimum package was Rs 2 lakhs and the maximum package is Rs 3.2 lakhs. The placement cell of the institute is very active and provides placement oriented training from the second year. The placement cell is very responsive and supportive to students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Yes, our college has all the necessary infrastructure, facilities and equipment. Classrooms are also wide and well maintained. Projectors are available in all the classrooms. Laboratories are equipped with necessary tools and resources. Library have most of the course books along with many novel books. Hostel facility also available with clean living spaces. Canteen food is also good and hygienic too. The Sports department is quite good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Environment is good. But facilities are not satisfactory.

review_content.Placements: Placement is not good enough, only about 10% of the students are placed in a decent company. Mostly in marketing, research and production placements are just nil or very few students are selected in production and packaging, research placements are not offered at all.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is decent, there is a lot of plants, a medicinal garden, lab animal section is separate and properly sterilized and the animals are treated properly. Sports facilities are also decent and laboratory facility are appreciable in comparison to other colleges.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: East or west S. D college of pharmacy and vocational studies is the best college.

content.Placements: 60% of students get good placements from the college campus. The minimum package was Rs 2 lakhs and the maximum package is Rs 3.2 lakhs. The placement cell of the institute is very active and provides placement oriented training from the second year. The placement cell is very responsive and supportive to students.
content.Infrastructure: Yes, our college has all the necessary infrastructure, facilities and equipment. Classrooms are also wide and well maintained. Projectors are available in all the classrooms. Laboratories are equipped with necessary tools and resources. Library have most of the course books along with many novel books. Hostel facility also available with clean living spaces. Canteen food is also good and hygienic too. The Sports department is quite good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Environment is good. But facilities are not satisfactory.

content.Placements: Placement is not good enough, only about 10% of the students are placed in a decent company. Mostly in marketing, research and production placements are just nil or very few students are selected in production and packaging, research placements are not offered at all.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is decent, there is a lot of plants, a medicinal garden, lab animal section is separate and properly sterilized and the animals are treated properly. Sports facilities are also decent and laboratory facility are appreciable in comparison to other colleges.

highlights.summary: The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with my college and course.

review_content.Placements: After qualifying the NEET UG exam, only you have been admitted to the MBBS course. After you have completed your degree, you can get various government jobs, like medical officer in the government of Odisha or the government of India, with a starting salary of 8 lakh per annum. Also, campus placements are there, like juniors and tutors. After MBBS, you become a doctor .
review_content.Infrastructure: Well-equipped with an AC classroom, a lift for going to the upper floors, a highly equipped lab and research done in the lab. 24/7 library facilities are available for students. The hostel provides lifts, hygienic washrooms, and three-bedded rooms with a bed, a chair, a table and a cupboard. The mess food is average but if you don't want that, there are many restaurants nearby that deliver the food to the hostel. A badminton court and a volleyball court were there for sports activities .

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: SLN Medical College, Koraput, is the top 4th medical college in Odisha.

review_content.Placements: As it is a medical college, there has been no problem with placements till now. Everybody will get placed after the 1st batch is out after 2023. Students get jobs through OPSC, UPSC, or they can choose any JRship or a contractual basis. They can get a PG seat through NEET PG.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is good infrastructure for all students and teachers. The hostels and quarters are good like other medical colleges in Odisha. They are well supplied with water and electricity. There is high-speed Wi-Fi all over the campus. The weather here in Koraput is the best part to live here. It is actually very good throughout the year.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good medical college with good infrastructure and advanced facilities in Odisha.

review_content.Placements: It is a government medical institute. Our college provides almost 100% of placements as there is a lack of good doctors in this state. All the students have to complete a 1-year internship with the government after completing the course. For the MBBS course, it is one of the best medical colleges in Odisha.
review_content.Infrastructure: All types of facilities are available, from basic to advanced. Our college provides facilities like Wi-Fi, laboratories, practical halls, a cafeteria, and advanced digital classrooms. The quality of the food served is good. It is a medical college, so medical facilities are good. A wide range of sports is played on campus.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: All medical colleges are good but this medical college has a good environment and beautiful weather.

content.Placements: Generally, in MBBS, there is nothing like placement. After MBBS, some students start preparing for their PG course and some choose to work as tutors in medical colleges. As a tutor, they get a salary of nearly 70,000. All students have to do their internship with their respective college hospitals; it is mandatory by NMC.
content.Infrastructure: There is a well-developed lecture theater, full-equipment labs and the library has a large number of books with wifi. In boys hostels, each room has 3 beds and 3 almirahs. On the college campus, there are 3 mess, which is average and they all charge 4,000 per month, which includes breakfast, lunch, and dinner. On campus, there is a volleyball court and badminton court. There is an annual function in college, which we called UNMESHA, which contains several sports and cultural events.

individual_reviews.title: Affordable medical education with strong clinical training in a developing campus environment.

content.Placements: Saheed Laxman Nayak Medical College, located in Koraput, Odisha, offers the MBBS program with an annual intake of 100 students. The course duration was 5.5 years. After MBBS, students typically did internships in the same college and received a stipend of up to Rs.30,000 per month. Junior resident salaries ranged from Rs.60,000 to Rs.80,000. 100% of students got placed for internships. Top recruiting sources were government medical services, PG entrance exams, and private hospital positions. The top roles offered were junior residents, house surgeons, and medical officers.

There is an annual function in college, which we called UNMESHA, which contains several sports and cultural events.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with my college and course.
reviews.review_text: Well-equipped with an AC classroom, a lift for going to the upper floors, a highly equipped lab and research done in the lab. 24/7 library facilities are available for students. The hostel provides lifts, hygienic washrooms, and three-bedded rooms with a bed, a chair, a table and a cupboard. The mess food is average but if you don't want that, there are many restaurants nearby that deliver the food to the hostel. A badminton court and a volleyball court were there for sports activities .

reviews.review_heading: SLN Medical College, Koraput, is the top 4th medical college in Odisha.
reviews.review_text: There is good infrastructure for all students and teachers. The hostels and quarters are good like other medical colleges in Odisha. They are well supplied with water and electricity. There is high-speed Wi-Fi all over the campus. The weather here in Koraput is the best part to live here. It is actually very good throughout the year.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good medical college with good infrastructure and advanced facilities in Odisha.
reviews.review_text: All types of facilities are available, from basic to advanced. Our college provides facilities like Wi-Fi, laboratories, practical halls, a cafeteria, and advanced digital classrooms. The quality of the food served is good. It is a medical college, so medical facilities are good. A wide range of sports is played on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Affordable medical education with strong clinical training in a developing campus environment.
reviews.review_text: It offered students well-equipped lecture halls, laboratories, and a central library with medical journals and internet access. The hostel facilities were modest, with shared rooms, basic furniture, and 24/7 water and electricity. Hygiene was maintained. Overall, facilities met students' needs.

reviews_list.batch_info: BHMS - Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I am hardly satisfied with the campus and our college provides the best education.

review_content.Placements: Placements depend upon students' scores and practical skills in practicing medicine. The passed-out students got placed in Wanless Hospital or the college hospital for case-taking and practicing. Some students went for teaching to other or the same college itself. Internships are unpaid. After graduation, you can opt for MD in a particular subject of interest.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is not so good. Hardly, any facilities are available. There are no lockers, girls' rooms, and campus. Classrooms have been innovated well with smart boards in each class. The laboratory facilities are not good. The laboratory instruments won't work properly and have less space. The canteen is built recently but it is costly. Our college does not provide opportunities in the sports field. Hostel facilities are not good. Hostel rooms are small. Cupboards are not available in the hostel. Restrooms are fewer. The hostel timings are maintained strictly at 7 PM. The food is average. The improvement is taking place after complaints. The hostel charges Rs.62,000 per annum which is costly.

review_content.Placements: This is a medical profession course, so there's no placements by companies like programs. But here the professionals are being created and creating the own placements in there learning. Medical students are not recruited but they can start their own clinics, especially Homeopaths. 100% of students get internships in government GH in there 4.5th year and have to do intern for 1 year, with a monthly salary alloted by the government of Tamil Nadu. Students could learn more clinical knowledge here in the intern life period. Thus, good doctors are the outcome of this college.

college_info.college_name: Biyani Girls College: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placement

highlights.summary: Biyani Girls College admission 2025 is open. For more details, students can visit the official website.

college_info.intro: The Institute offers Undergraduate courses such as BA, BSc, BCom, BVA, BBA, BCA and Postgraduate courses including MA, MSc, and MCom. Admission to the respective courses is offered on the basis of merit and entrance. Therefore, candidates must secure the minimum aggregate in Class 12 for UG level admissions. Whereas, for PG level admissions, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate in graduation. The fee structure of the respective courses includes tuition fees, which may vary from INR 75K to INR 4 Lakh. For more details around Biyani Girls College popular programmes, check out the table below:

faqs.answer: A:    The B.Ed programme at Biyani Girls College spans a duration of two years, allowing participants to delve into core papers focusing on Childhood and Growing Up, Learning and Teaching, Gender School and Society etc. Additionally, practical components aim to enhance professional capacities through activities like reading, reflecting, drama, and art in education.
faqs.question: What is the duration of the BEd programme at Biyani Girls College?

The College offers respective courses for the annual course fees ranging from to . For more details around Biyani Girls College courses, fees, and eligibility, check out the table below:

faqs.answer: A:    Biyani Girls College admissions are offered on the basis of merit. Candidates must secure a minimum aggregate in Class 12 and graduation to seek admission to UG and PG level programmes. Furthermore, the College has not yet declared any examination level requirement as a part of the eligibility criteria. However, while applying for the admission to Biyani Girls College, candidates must enquire the same from the College administration office for the respective course eligibility criteria.
faqs.question: Can I join Biyani Girls College without entrance exam?

faqs.answer: A:    Biyani Girls College offers courses such as BSc for 3 years to 4 years with various specialisations. The College offers respective course on the basis of merit with an annual course fees varying from INR 75K to INR 80K. In addition to this, Biyani Girls College offers the respective course with the annual hostel fees of worth INR 1.20 Lakh. Apart from this, candidates are ought to pay INR 1,100 as the application fees.
faqs.question: What is the fee for BSc at Biyani Girls College?

faqs.answer: A:    In order to apply for BSc-MEd course at Biyani Girls College, candidates should complete a PG with 55% aggregate (general). For other categories, students should complete PG with 50% aggregate. Apart from this, the duration of the course is three years. The degree is offered through the University of Rajasthan.
faqs.question: Who is eligible for BSc-MEd course at Biyani Girls College?

faqs.answer: A:    The selection criteria for various course admissions at Biyani BEd Girls College is merit-based. Candidates looking for course admissions at BGC should meet the last educational qualification set by the college. reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: I am not fully satisfied with my college life here.

review_content.Placements: There were no students who received placements from the college, and no companies came. I don't think that if someone does get a placement, the student should rely on on-campus placements. They should consider off-campus options. I believe the highest placement package was 3 or 4 LPA, and I don't think that's good.
review_content.Infrastructure: There was Wi-Fi with medium speed. The labs are good, and the classrooms are also good. The library was full of many books and had plenty of space. I didn't visit the hostel, but my classmates said it wasn't very good. The mess and canteen food weren't great, and the canteen was often empty. For half a year, the only things available in the canteen were biscuits, chips, and Kurkure. Sometimes, they host parties, but even the parties were sometimes spoiled.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Biyani Group of Colleges is good for women and their careers.

review_content.Placements: The college brings many opportunities for students to build themself for their future. Biyani Girls College placements are exceptional. Most importantly, teachers are very supportive and encouraging. The college provides us with good internships for a better future.
review_content.Infrastructure: The quality of college infrastructure significantly affects students' perception of their well-being. The college offers well-maintained classrooms with tidy chairs and reliable Wi-Fi with internet access. Our college also provides hostels with rules and regulations to ensure student safety.

review_summary.college_name: Biyani Girls College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college. Don't take a job, give it.

content.Placements: The students of our college passed with a very good percentage and got placed in different and best companies. They provide us with different courses at the college campus. They also provide internships in different companies and in college. They organised different placement opportunities for the growth of the students.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms and labs of college are very good. The food in canteen is tasty and healthy. The facilities of that college are also great. The canteen is also very hygienic and clean. The staff of this college is also good in their behaviour. They promote daily activities like yoga and sports for the good health of the students.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of BIyani Girls College, Jaipur.

content.Placements: 80% of students get placed. The college provides a good placement opportunity. Many well-known companies recruit students from our college. Many paid and unpaid internships are also provided. Overall, placement opportunities are good and well-managed.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is overall good. College is located in Vidyadhar Nagar, which is a good area. The building has been well-maintained. Classes are fully furnished and spacious. Proper ventilation is provided. It has a well-maintained auditorium also.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am not fully satisfied with my college life here.

content.Placements: There were no students who received placements from the college, and no companies came. I don't think that if someone does get a placement, the student should rely on on-campus placements. They should consider off-campus options. I believe the highest placement package was 3 or 4 LPA, and I don't think that's good.
content.Infrastructure: There was Wi-Fi with medium speed. The labs are good, and the classrooms are also good. The library was full of many books and had plenty of space. I didn't visit the hostel, but my classmates said it wasn't very good. The mess and canteen food weren't great, and the canteen was often empty. For half a year, the only things available in the canteen were biscuits, chips, and Kurkure. Sometimes, they host parties, but even the parties were sometimes spoiled.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Biyani Group of Colleges is good for women and their careers.

content.Placements: The college brings many opportunities for students to build themself for their future. Biyani Girls College placements are exceptional. Most importantly, teachers are very supportive and encouraging. The college provides us with good internships for a better future.
content.Infrastructure: The quality of college infrastructure significantly affects students' perception of their well-being. The college offers well-maintained classrooms with tidy chairs and reliable Wi-Fi with internet access. Our college also provides hostels with rules and regulations to ensure student safety.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with Biyani Girls College, as it aims for nurturing young women leaders.

content.Placements: College brings placement opportunities for students on a regular basis with renowned organizations. Also, the college organizes a placement drive every year in which approximately 30-40 companies participate together to recruit skilled and qualified students for vacant job roles.
content.Infrastructure: College is good and has a peaceful environment that brings positivity. It also has various facilities, including a gym area, counseling facilities, canteen facilities, club areas (activity-wise), libraries, smart classrooms, an auditorium, a computer lab, and a Science lab.

admission_overview.college_name: Biyani Girls College Course Admissions 2025: Eligibility, Selection, Fee, Application Process

admission_overview.title: Biyani Girls College Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Currently, Biyani Girls College admissions 2025 is open. The college offers more than ten courses including certificate courses. The selection criteria is based on merit The application process at Biyani Girls College is both an online/offline procedure. The college also offers over 12 certificate courses and the college is affiliated with the University of Rajasthan. However, the UG integrated course is offered by Biyani Girls College. Read on to know more about various Biyani Girls College programmes and their respective admission criteria

eligibility_selection.title: Biyani Girls College Eligibility & Selection 2025
eligibility_selection.description: Biyani Girls College admissions to UG & PG courses are based on merit/entrance exam. Along with that, candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses. Check below the course-wise eligibility & selection criteria for the BGEC courses 2025:

courses_table.eligibility: Candidates must have passed 10+2 (Science stream) from a recognised board with a minimum 50% aggregate marks.
Graduation in a relevant science discipline from a recognized university with a minimum 50% aggregate marks.

faqs.answer: To secure a seat at Biyani Girls College, students can check the following steps presented below:Visit the official website and complete the online application process.Ensure eligibility and merit-based selection for UG and PG programs.Sit and appear for entrance exam as per respective courses.Upon being selected, pay the specified fee to confirm and secure your seat.
faqs.question: How do I get a seat at Biyani Girls College?

admission_process.title: Biyani Girls College Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Biyani Girls College admission process includes registration, selection, national/university/state entrance exam score and admission confirmation. Candidates must follow the steps below to get a seat in Biyani Girls College:
STEP 1: Biyani Girls College Application Process 2025
Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the college. Candidates need to pay an application fee as per the respective courses.
STEP 2: Selection Round

Biyani Girls B.Ed College shortlists candidates based on Merit. Apart from this, candidates also have to meet the educational qualifications set by the college. Students can also check the course-wise eligibility from the table above for the top courses.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation
Once selection rounds are over, the college releases a merit list. Selected aspirants are allotted a seat in the college. Candidates need to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the college.

reviews.review_text: There was Wi-Fi with medium speed. The labs are good, and the classrooms are also good. The library was full of many books and had plenty of space. I didn't visit the hostel, but my classmates said it wasn't very good. The mess and canteen food weren't great, and the canteen was often empty. For half a year, the only things available in the canteen were biscuits, chips, and Kurkure. Sometimes, they host parties, but even the parties were sometimes spoiled.

reviews.review_heading: Biyani Group of Colleges is good for women and their careers.
reviews.review_text: The quality of college infrastructure significantly affects students' perception of their well-being. The college offers well-maintained classrooms with tidy chairs and reliable Wi-Fi with internet access. Our college also provides hostels with rules and regulations to ensure student safety.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with Biyani Girls College, as it aims for nurturing young women leaders.
reviews.review_text: College is good and has a peaceful environment that brings positivity. It also has various facilities, including a gym area, counseling facilities, canteen facilities, club areas (activity-wise), libraries, smart classrooms, an auditorium, a computer lab, and a Science lab.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for girls' education, and it also works for empowering women.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is well-maintained and offers a clean and healthy learning environment. The hostel offers clean and comfortable rooms. It offers good quality food. Many classrooms are well-equipped.

reviews.review_heading: Biyani Girls College of Nursing: Good faculty and infrastructure, needs better placements.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities in the college are well-maintained and equipped with all essential amenities to ensure a comfortable stay for students. While the accommodation capacity is adequate, availability may become limited during peak admission periods, so applying early is advisable. The hostels offer a secure environment with round-the-clock surveillance and staff support. Regular cleaning and maintenance are carried out to maintain hygiene and provide a healthy living atmosphere.

reviews.review_heading: The inside life of a nursing student.
reviews.review_text: There is a well-structured campus. Academic facilities like a lecture hall with smart boards are available. The hostel is clean, safe, and under warden supervision. There are mess facilities with nutritious meals. Sports and games are available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Biyani Law CollegeReviewed on 27 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with overall facilities.
reviews.review_text: The quality of the hostel is average. It has a clean environment. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is edible and hygienic. The overall facilities of the college are above average. They provide Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, a library, a cafeteria, restrooms, medical rooms, and so on. They also have a huge ground and court.

reviews.review_heading: It has great faculty members and excellent infrastructure. Placement opportunities need improvement.
reviews.review_text: Our course facilities are very good. We have Wi-Fi available in the classrooms. The library is also available. Everything is available and good. The hostel facilities are also good. The food in the mess and canteen is also good. We also have excellent sports and games facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Biyani Law CollegeReviewed on 1 Dec 2024)
reviews.review_heading: My college through my eyes.
reviews.review_text: Our classrooms are well-furnished and air-conditioned. The lab is fully maintained. We have a clean library. It has helpful and valuable books. They have useful content for the legal professions in our college. Medical facilities are available. Sports activities are held every 3-4 weeks.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Biyani Law CollegeReviewed on 6 Oct 2024)
reviews.review_heading: The College is Nice Compared to Others Nearby
reviews.review_text: The college has a library where all the bare acts and various types of books are available. The college also has a moot court, where we practice for our careers, argue with each other, and share our points of view on the laws made by the government and our opinions.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Biyani College of Science and ManagementReviewed on 13 Aug 2024)
reviews.review_heading: An average teacher training college .
reviews.review_text: My course was a teacher training course, and we had to study how to teach students, learn the methods of teaching, and practice those techniques. The college also provided hostel facilities. The hostels were well maintained, the food quality was amazing, and the menu setup was very good and nutritious.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Biyani Law CollegeReviewed on 6 Aug 2024)
reviews.review_heading: One of the best law college.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is excellent, and good facilities are available like food, Wi-Fi, medical facilities, etc., in both college and hostel. Sports and games are available every month, cultural events are performed, and the mess and canteen are hygienic.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Biyani Law CollegeReviewed on 31 May 2024)
reviews.review_heading: The facilities is excellent in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure available in our college is quite satisfactory. Our college provides all the facilities to the students. The resources we have in our college include a huge library, high-speed internet-run labs, standardized classrooms, modern medical services, and facilities, and many more. The hostels of our college are also well-equipped and good. At the hostel, the food served to the students is very healthy, clean and safe for human consumption. They do not offer bonuses for sports parti...

cut_off.college_name: Dr. Bhubaneswar Borooah Cancer Institute Cutoff 2025: Check NEET SS Round-Wise Cutoff Ranks

description: Dr. Bhubaneswar Borooah Cancer Institute cutoff 2025 has been released for NEET PG Round 2. The cutoff is out in form of ranks for admission to the MD, MS, and PG Diploma courses at the PG level. Students can view the exam-wise sections below to know more about the cutoff in detail across different courses, rounds, and categories. More exam-related updates are below:

The Dr. Bhubaneswar Borooah Cancer Institute NEET PG Cutoff 2025 for Round 2 has been released for admission to various MD courses. The toughest MD specialisation was MD in Radiotherapy for the General AI category, with the cutoff being 9360.
For more specialisations and courses, check out the table below:
In 2025, the NEET PG cutoff ranged from 9360 to 16776, with MD being the most challenging for admission among the General AI category.
Students can refer to the table below to know the cutoff data for 2025, 2024, and 2023 for different categories, quotas and rounds.
Students who appeared for the NEET PG exam 2025 can refer to the table below to view the NEET PG Round 1 cutoff list. They can also download the results for later use.
From the table below, students can do a comparison of different colleges that accept NEET PG results for admission.

Dr. Bhubaneswar Borooah Cancer Institute NEET SS cutoff 2025 is out for Round 1. The NBEMS has released the NEET SS cutoff for admission to Super Speciality courses, such as DM, DNB and MCh etc. The cutoff is available for different categories under the AI quota. For the General category students under the AI quota, the NEET SS 2025 cutoff ranged between 23 and 286, with M.Ch. being the highly sought-after course for admission.

Dr. Bhubaneswar Borooah Cancer Institute M.Ch. cutoff 2025 ranged between 23 and 286 for the General category under the AI quota. With a lowest cutoff rank of 23, M.Ch. in Head and Neck Surgery turned out to be the most competitive specialisation for admission.
Students not eligible for this specialisation can also consider M.Ch. in Gynaecological Oncology with a lenient first-round cutoff rank of for admission.

The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Average hostel facilities but provides good education.

review_content.Placements: This is a new college so it does not have any pass out students. We currently don't know about the package. About 99% students got internships in Civil Hospital, Godhara. Top roles in my course offered are MBBS doctors, clinicians, and also health workers.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have average facilities in the hostel. There are clean rooms and washrooms for students. The canteen is good and provides proper food for students. There are not so many sports but we have sports like volleyball, table tennis, and badminton that we can play on the ground.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: This college is the best for students.

review_content.Placements: In MBBS, every student undergoes compulsory internship, so placement is nearly 100%. Stipend ranges from Rs 20,000 per month to Rs 30,000 per month in government hospitals, higher in private hospitals. Roles include junior president and medical officer, while many students focus on PG entrance exams.
review_content.Infrastructure: The department has lecture halls, labs, Wi-Fi, library, and a teaching hospital for clinical practice. Hostel facilities are decent with sports areas and 24X7 medical care. Mess food is satisfactory and hygienic. Hostel facilities are good but sometimes not good.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: This college is one of the best colleges.

review_content.Placements: In MBBS, 100% of students get compulsory internships in attached hospital. Average stipend is Rs 25,000 to Rs 30,000 per month, higher in private hospital. Top recruiters are AIIMS Apollo, Fortis, etc., with roles like junior president and medical officer. Most pursue PG after MBBS.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms provide smart boards, Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, central library with e-resources, and good hospital exposure. Hostel rooms are decent with Wi-Fi, common rooms, and sports facilities. Mess food is average but hygienic. Basic medical facilities and 24X7 hospital access are available.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: The best medical college to make your dreams come true.

review_content.Placements: There is 100% placement in our college. We have our own civil hospital. Our college makes us eligible to that level where we meet our connection to national levels and allows the another prestigious hospital to take vacancies from our college. Many prestigious hospital provides direct placement from our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have a fascinating infrastructure at our college. We have natural ventilation with advanced classrooms, and along with that, we have top-notch medicine software, and we have a fully facilitated hostel. We have our canteen, which provides a home food feel.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: One of the best colleges of my life.

review_content.Placements: In MBBS, every student is assured of internship, so the placement rate is nearly 100%. Internships provide valuable hands on training with stipend. Afterwards, students either join a top hospital as junior doctors or prepare for higher studies like NEET PG. Roles such as intern, junior president, and medical officer ensure strong career opportunities.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our MBBS course has good infrastructure with smart classrooms, modern labs, a well stocked library, and a teaching hospital for clinical training. Hostel life is comfortable with clean rooms, proper security, and 24/7 facilities. The mess serves hygienic food, and a canteen is also available. Medical care, sports grounds, and indoor games make the campus environment lively and supportive for students.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: I'm satisfied with this college because one of the best faculty is present here.

review_content.Placements: In MBBS placement is nearly 100% as every student gets a compulsory internship in the college hospital with a stipend. After internships, students work as junior doctors or prepare for NEET PG. Top hospitals like AIIMS, Apollo, and government institutes hire MBBS graduates. Roles include intern, junior president, and medical officer, with excellent future growth.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our MBBS course has good classrooms, labs, library, and hospital for clinical exposure. The hostel is clean with proper facilities, hygienic mess food, and canteen. Medical care is available on campus, along with sports and games, making the study and living environment comfortable.

college_info.college_name: Nri Institute Of Technology, Agiripalli: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary:
The AP EAPCET 2026 registration last date has been extended to Mar 24, 2026, (without a late fee) for Nri Institute Of Technology, Agiripalli admission to the BTech and BPharma courses. The BTech exams are scheduled for May 12 to May 15, and on May 18, 2026, followed by the BPharma exam on May 19 and May 20, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Offered in the final year only
Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved

faqs.answer: A:    Nri Institute Of Technology, Agiripalli has been rated 4.1 on placements on the basis of 127 reviews done by students.
faqs.question: Does Nri Institute Of Technology, Agiripalli provide good placement facilities?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, Nri Institute Of Technology, Agiripalli offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from streams like Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. College offers B.E. / B.Tech and B.Pharma courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and Pharm.D. The Nri Institute Of Technology, Agiripalli course fee ranges between INR 70,000 to 2,20,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Review of NRI Institute of Technology.

review_content.Placements: 80% of students joined in CSE course because it is a very in-demand course for the future generation. The highest package is 45 LPA, and the lowest package is 3 LPA, respectively. Many companies visit our college in Andhra Pradesh. Some students also join internships with these companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: NRI College near Vijayawada is somewhat the best for infrastructure facilities. We have the best and nice classrooms, and the labs are well-equipped. We also have one small library and a medical clinic for hostelers. We have sports class every day.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Nri Institute Of Technology, Agiripalli.

review_content.Placements: NRI is one of the best top placement colleges near Vijayawada and is located in Agiripalli. The highest package is about 20 LPA, and the lowest package is 3 LPA. So many companies come to our college. Some of the students are going for internships at other companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: For infrastructure, NRI is not more good somewhat enough. We have nice classrooms and hostel facilities available for long-distance students. We have no Wi-Fi system. We have a small library with some books. Medical facility is available for hostelers.

fee_structure.heading: Nri Institute Of Technology, Agiripalli Courses & Fees 2025
fee_structure.overview: The AP EAPCET 2026 registration last date has been extended to Mar 24, 2026, (without a late fee) for Nri Institute Of Technology, Agiripalli admission to the BTech and BPharma courses. The BTech exams are scheduled for May 12 to May 15, and on May 18, 2026, followed by the BPharma exam on May 19 and May 20, 2026.

faqs.answer: Nri Institute Of Technology, Agiripalli courses are approved by eminent Government bodies such as AICTE, PCI. The combined seats available for various programmes provided by Nri Institute Of Technology, Agiripalli goes up to 1222.
faqs.question: Q: How many seats are available at Nri Institute Of Technology, Agiripalli for all courses combined?

faqs.answer: Nri Institute Of Technology, Agiripalli has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible. Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis. Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana. Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023). There is no upper age limit.B.PharmaCandidates should have completed 16 years of age by the date of commencement of admission or on such other date as may be notified by the CET committee. There is no upper age limit.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks for BC categories. Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible. Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB. Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have passsed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained at least 50% marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto. Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.

content.Placements: About placements it is good not best just like many other colleges. The highest package is 13 LPA, the lowest is 6 LPA, and average package is 7.5 LPA. But the only downside is that there are only less students who are getting packages in our college, it is huge concern.
content.Infrastructure: When it comes to infrastructure, it is good compared to many other local colleges. The food is best just like how our home food will be. When it comes to ground, it is one of the biggest grounds in local colleges, but they stopped giving us sports period.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied, because of quality of education and well-trained professors. Good courses are provided.

content.Placements: 25 percent of students in my course are placed. The highest package is 11 LPA, and the lowest package is 2 LPA. Companies like Infosys, TCS, and other well-known recruiters visit the campus every year. Roles include software engineer, mechanical engineer, and civil engineer.
content.Infrastructure: Labs have specialized equipment and are maintained neatly every day. There is a floor dedicated to the library. The canteen offers a variety of foods like bakery items, fast food, and regular meals. The food is moderate in taste. Overall, the facilities of the college are acceptable.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of NRI Institute of Technology.

content.Placements: 80% of students joined in CSE course because it is a very in-demand course for the future generation. The highest package is 45 LPA, and the lowest package is 3 LPA, respectively. Many companies visit our college in Andhra Pradesh. Some students also join internships with these companies.
content.Infrastructure: NRI College near Vijayawada is somewhat the best for infrastructure facilities. We have the best and nice classrooms, and the labs are well-equipped. We also have one small library and a medical clinic for hostelers. We have sports class every day.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of Nri Institute Of Technology, Agiripalli.

content.Placements: NRI is one of the best top placement colleges near Vijayawada and is located in Agiripalli. The highest package is about 20 LPA, and the lowest package is 3 LPA. So many companies come to our college. Some of the students are going for internships at other companies.
content.Infrastructure: For infrastructure, NRI is not more good somewhat enough. We have nice classrooms and hostel facilities available for long-distance students. We have no Wi-Fi system. We have a small library with some books. Medical facility is available for hostelers.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: NRI Institute of Technology.

content.Placements: A maximum of 90% of the students have joined the CSE course. The highest package is about 25 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA. Top companies in our surroundings have come to our college to offer placements. Some of the students are going for internships.
content.Infrastructure: We have the best infrastructure here, and the best equipment is available. We have canteens and a medical clinic for both hostelers and day boarders. We have sports facilities for sports students. We have events every two weeks. We have many well-equipped labs.

faqs.question: How can I get into Nri Institute Of Technology, Agiripalli for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Nri Institute Of Technology, Agiripalli has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible.
Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis.
Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana.
Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023).
There is no upper age limit.B.PharmaCandidates should have completed 16 years of age by the date of commencement of admission or on such other date as may be notified by the CET committee. There is no upper age limit.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute.
45% marks

The central library spans 755 sqm with a seating capacity of 150 students and facilitates a digital library with internet connectivity, nptel video courses, and reprography services.

review_content.Placements: The placement record of IITM Sonipat is overall good. The highest package is 12 LPA and the average salary package is 2.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies Genpact, HCL, Amazon, NIIT, etc. In HCL, 7 students are placed.
review_content.Infrastructure: IITM is spread around 13 acres. On the national highway no. 4, there is a library with a seating capacity of 300 readers. High-speed Wi-Fi enabled campus. Hostel separate facilities for boys and girl, mess facilities. In sports there is boxing bring, cricket ground other sport facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: All the hype about the college in the market is not worth it.

review_content.Placements: Most of the students are from B.Teach who got placement. The lowest package is 5 LPA, and the highest is 20 LPA. I give a 10% rating for students getting internships from our college course. The rating I have given includes both paid and unpaid internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is good but doesn't have access to Wi-Fi or internet connection anywhere on college campuses. Medical facilities, sports, and games are not good, and the quality of food available in the mess is average. There is no Wi-Fi in the hostel here. And during holidays, the library doesn't open for hostel students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the teachers and supportive faculty.

review_content.Placements: The students who get above 60% marks get the admission. The highest package of this college is 10LPA and the lowest is 3LPA. Almost 100% of students got the internship at many MNC companies. In our course, they offer many specializations like AI, ML, Data Science, Electrical Engineering, and many more.
review_content.Infrastructure: They have good rooms and good faculty members too. They have good rooms for different classes and branches. For techno classes, they have a fully AC seminar hall. For EGD class, they have a good room with a good teacher. For Physics class, they have a good Physics lab and many more rooms.

faqs.question: Q: How to get admission to International Institute of Technology and Management?

faqs.answer: Admission to the International Institute of Technology and Management (IITM) can vary in difficulty based on several factors such as the programme you're applying for, the competition, and your academic profile. Generally, competitive institutes like IITM tend to have stringent admission criteria, which may include entrance exams, academic performance, and sometimes interviews.To improve your chances, it's important to have a strong academic record, perform well in relevant entrance exams, and fulfill any additional requirements specified by the institute. The level of competition can be high, so preparing well in advance is key to securing a spot. Ultimately, the difficulty will depend on your preparedness and how well you meet the institute's specific requirements.
faqs.question: Q: How hard is getting admission into International Institute of Technology and Management?

faqs.answer: Students may gain direct entry into International Institute of Technology and Management (IITM) through its specific admissions requirements. Students can secure admission at the institute directly through two categories: by exceeding 80% marks in their 10+2 exams and achieving a rank in national-level entrance tests JEE Main or CUET. Students who finished their Diploma at a recognised university are eligible to seek second-year B.Tech admission at International Institute of Technology and Management. 15% of total admission slots at the institute become accessible through direct entry into its management quota. Students can access direct entry opening but need to meet the requirements and avail vacant spaces in the program.
faqs.question: Q: Can I get direct admission to International Institute of Technology and Management?

faqs.answer: Candidates who wish to study at the International Institute of Technology and Management (IITM) for their UG/PG programs must fulfill the specific entry standards. Those applying to UG courses need to pass their 10+2 level academic education with at least 45% marks from physics, mathematics and either chemistry or computer Science or biology. The eligibility requirement for PG admission demands that candidates hold a minimum of 50% marks in their bachelor's degree. Admission to the B.Tech programme requires JEE Main exam scores. The entrance scores of CMAT determine admission to the MBA programme, while NIMCET scores enable candidates to enroll in MCA programs. All candidates need to complete an interview procedure before proceeding. The total student admissions for UG courses stand at 420, while PG course admissions total up to 180.

admission_process.title: International Institute of Technology and Management Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: International Institute of Technology and Management admission process begins with an online/offline application process. The college conducts admissions in several rounds. Candidates can check the following steps for International Institute of Technology and Management admissions:
Step 1: Application Process
The application process is conducted in both online and offline modes. Candidates can visit the college's website or the campus to apply for their desired programme.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

International Institute of Technology and Management admissions are both merit-based and entrance-based. For courses such as MBA, BTech, BBA and BCA, students must qualify for the relevant national-level entrance exams. However, for the remaining courses, admissions are merit-based.
Step 3: Final Admission
At last, the finalised students must pay a certain amount of the course fee and submit their documents for verification to confirm their seats.

reviews.review_heading: Something real about my college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is average, as the building of our college is not looking new and it demands maintenance. The quality of food available in the canteen is just to eat, not of good quality, as the food taste is normal and not liked by all the students.

reviews.review_heading: All students, everybody, admission all the time, this college is a very good college.
reviews.review_text: The main college facility, Wi-Fi, is the best and the labs are even better. My classroom, bedroom, and the main college library are fully air-conditioned. The hotel facility is the best and the food is good. The rooms also have AC. My college has great sports facilities, with cricket in the first position in present days. My college is one of the best colleges with the best facility.

reviews.review_heading: Decent college in Sonipat.
reviews.review_text: IITM is spread around 13 acres. On the national highway no. 4, there is a library with a seating capacity of 300 readers. High-speed Wi-Fi enabled campus. Hostel separate facilities for boys and girl, mess facilities. In sports there is boxing bring, cricket ground other sport facilities.

reviews.review_heading: All the hype about the college in the market is not worth it.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is good but doesn't have access to Wi-Fi or internet connection anywhere on college campuses. Medical facilities, sports, and games are not good, and the quality of food available in the mess is average. There is no Wi-Fi in the hostel here. And during holidays, the library doesn't open for hostel students.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the teachers and supportive faculty.
reviews.review_text: They have good rooms and good faculty members too. They have good rooms for different classes and branches. For techno classes, they have a fully AC seminar hall. For EGD class, they have a good room with a good teacher. For Physics class, they have a good Physics lab and many more rooms.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the placements of the college.
reviews.review_text: Bus pickup and drop facility, well-maintained canteen, fully Wi-Fi campus, hostel are there for both boys and girls, etc. are there. There is also a boxing match and a cricket match. Classroom environments are good for students. Mess food is average. There are many labs for pharmacy students and other departments.

reviews.review_heading: My best experience of review to my college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for the course provided by the college is good and the college offers various facilities to the students, like transport (pick and drop) facility, a good environment for the students, and various sports organized on campus such as cricket, volleyball, basketball as well as indoor sports.

reviews.review_heading: If you were looking for college for doing BTech in low fees, then this is the option.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good but not that good. Canteen, classroom, library are good built and the college Wi-Fi is also nice. Labs were in good condition. One problem is that in library there is no air conditioner, the heat was too much in library for which students can't focus on study in summer. Sports were 0 in college; only boxing is there.

reviews.review_heading: Welcome to my college, friends.
reviews.review_text: In the campus, everything is available: Wi-Fi, labs, and a library. All facilities should be free, and the books are in good condition and sufficient for studying. Three meals a day are provided for hostel students. Sports are not regularly organized but are available.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure and facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides canteen and medical facilities, but sports are not good. I am a hostler, and the environment is very good with friendly people, and the food is also good. The library is good. Labs have old PCs, and many practicals are not possible due to that.

reviews.review_heading: Review of International Institute of Technology and Management.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was good. Machines and equipment were available in the workshop, but it can be improved. There were very few lathe machines. Hence, it can be improved. They can also arrange CNC operating machine which will be very useful.

reviews.review_heading: Overall the college is good, and the faculty members are also good. Placements here are also good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is actually good. We have a Wi-Fi that works perfectly with the good uploading speed. Labs have the latest technology in terms of computer. Classrooms have am air-conditioner. The library is huge as compared to other colleges in Haryana Sonipat, and you can borrow almost any book related to your courses. The college is huge in terms of acres, and facilities available in the college works well. Facilities in the hostel are excellent and also the food served is de...

reviews.review_heading: Good and friendly environment, no ragging and misbehaving by senior and helpful management.
reviews.review_text:
1. Wi-Fi is available all over the college.
 Speed of Wi-Fi is about 50mbps.
 Computer labs are available.
 Library with good amount of book for reading.
 Class has very big and also life facilities are available.
2. Facilities of hostel is good, quality of food in hostel is below the average.
 No medical staff available.
 Sports is available college is preparing for a new cricket group
 Many cultural events are organizing by college time to time.

reviews.review_heading: This college is good for students who belong to the middle-class family.
reviews.review_text: The college has a good infrastructure. Wi-Fi facility is available on the campus. It has 4 libraries. Indoor games like table tennis and outdoor activities like cricket ground and basketball court are available.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the college in the aspect of campus crowd and events and fests.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of college is really good. It has a vast area, and the plus point is that the college is located on the national highway. So there is no worry about finding the college as it's just on NH-1. There is a big library in the college where all the students can issue books and then return after the semester which is very good of them.

fee_structure.overview: The TG EAPCET 2026 registration has commenced for Brilliant Grammar School Educational Society's Group of Institutions admission to BPharma and BE/BTech courses. The deadline to register without a late fee is Apr 4, 2026. The entrance exam for BPharm is scheduled for May 4 and May 5, 2026, while the BE/BTech exam will be held from May 9 to May 11, 2026.

faqs.answer: Brilliant Grammar School Educational Society's Group of Institutions has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityM.PharmaCandidate must have completed B.Pharma. or its equivalent degree from a recognised university. Candidate must have secured 50% marks in group subjects taken together in the qualifying examination (45% for reserved category).B.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed or appeared at the final year of the Diploma examination in Engineering conducted by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh. Candidates should have completed 16 years of age, as on 31st December of the year of admission. There is no upper age limit.B.PharmaCandidates must have completed 16 years of Age by the date of commencement of Admissions or on such other date as may be notified by the CET Committee. There is no upper age limit.After 10th DiplomaCandidates must have passed 10th examination conducted by State Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana or from any other recognised board in India with Mathematics as one of the subjects, and obtained at least 35% marks in the qualifying examination. Candidate must have passed all the subjects including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, with minimum of 35% Marks in each subject. Candidates who appeared or are appearing for SSC or equivalent examination being held in March/April-2023, and whose results are yet to be declared are also eligible.

review_summary.college_name: Brilliant Grammar School Educational Society's Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Faculty members and infrastructure is excellent.

content.Placements: Up to 10% of students got placed in our course. The highest package is between Rs. 15,000- Rs. 20,000. 15% of students got internships from our course in company Mindsprc Innovation and many more companies are also interested in our college to offer internships.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure of our college are very flexible, especially in classrooms, labs, and library where students can access and gain knowledge. Hostel facilities are good and the quality of food is just average. Canteen food in our college is very superb.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college with qualified faculty members, good infrastructure, and placements in 2025.

content.Placements: 10% of students are course in my college. The highest salary package offered is 10 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 2.5 LPA. Their would be internships. Top companies will conduct interviews in college and select the students. The college offers placements.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure and various departments. The college has a library with different books and journals. The college has a broad play ground and bus facilities. The canteen has different items and taste good. A big playground is present in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: A brief about my college.

content.Placements: Only about 60% of students get placed through college placements. The highest package is around 9.5 LPA and the lowest is about 3.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies at our college are Tech Mahindra, TCS, Wipro, etc. Only a few percentage of students get internship opportunities, and this percentage is below average. Roles offered are testers, designers, data entry, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is decent. Facilities are not up to the mark but are okay. The library has a good amount of books organized by branch, year, and course. There is no hostel provided by the college, so students rely on nearby hostels located near the campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: A brief about my college.

content.Placements: About 75% of students are placed in my college, with packages ranging from 9.5 LPA to 4 LPA. Even my senior get a more package. The top recruiting companies for my course are TCS, Microsoft, and Tech Mahindra. Internships packages around 10 LPA to 25 LPA, and roles offered for my course are developer and designer. My college has the best performance to date.
content.Infrastructure: Our facilities are the best. Digital classrooms, digital libraries, and free Wi-Fi facility. Classrooms are neat and clean. There is no hostel provided by the college, so students rely on hostels located near the college locality. The library has a good amount of books organized by course and year.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the college is very good for our future, and we can expect more placements this time.

content.Placements: About 30% of students get placed in our course. The salary package offered is 6 LPA. The top recruiting company for our course is Wipro. Only 10% of students got internships as these days companies are offering very few jobs, so it is difficult. Placements are available off-campus, but from the college side, the college is trying its best to give more placements.
content.Infrastructure: We have good facilities like a library, full equipment labs, and neat classrooms. The quality of the food in the canteen is good, and I would rate 8 out of 10 for it. It also provides medical facilities like first aid and separate restrooms for girls. Other facilities for girls are also provided.

reviews.review_heading: Review of our college .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is somehow good, and the facilities are good and on time. Classrooms are neat and clean. The library is also a good, comfortable place on our campus. Computer systems and labs are in good working order at times. Weekly, we will play sports. We have the cricket ground, and we have medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The story behind a student in B. Tech college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college needs to be developed a lot. The management should take care of the classes and premises. The Wi-Fi is like a tortoise. The laboratories have decent working computers. The library has a plentiful amount of books and is even separated based on the courses.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied because of the faculty. Good education will be provided.
reviews.review_text: Labs, classrooms, library, sports ground, and canteen are all good. Labs where we practice and receive explanations from our faculty are clean and well-maintained. The canteen area is peaceful, and the food available there is good.

reviews.review_heading: It's the best college with a lot of memories .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure: The restrooms were not good, and the hostel food was good. The canteen had good infrastructure. Our library also had good infrastructure with all the updated books. Every year, we had sports events like cricket, chess, carrom, kho-kho, and kabaddi. We also had festivals like the traditional day and the annual day.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty is helpful, good coding facilities and good placements.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good for studying.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfies because of faculty, really good infrastructure and facilities etc.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Brilliant Grammar School Educational Society's Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are excellent, and the weather is pleasant. The hostel facilities are good but average for students. Most students learn everything they can about their courses.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Truba Institute of Pharmacy offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.Pharma and D.Pharma. reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college.

review_content.Placements: In our college, almost 70% of students are placed in our course. The highest salary package offered is 15 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Sun Pharma, Cipla, Lupin, Zydus, Torrent, etc., visit our campus. Almost 50% of students get internships. Around 20% of students get internships at top companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs and smart classrooms are available. An auditorium is available. There are separate hostels for girls and boys. A cafeteria, a gym, and a library are good. Medical facilities are available. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. A sports complex is available. The quality of food in the mess is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: There were average placement opportunities in 2020.

review_content.Placements: In total, 20 percent of the students were placed in my college. The highest and best package offered is about Rs.20 Lacs to 30 Lacs while the average package offered is Rs.10 to 15 Lacs and the minimum is Rs.500000.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities in our department are average. The library and classrooms are not that good. The hostel facilities are also just average but the environment of the hostel is very good.
review_content.Faculty: The teachers are very helpful, understandable, and knowledgeable. They have qualified at a very high level. Their teaching methods are very clear and clean. The difficulty level of semester exams is average and the pass percentage is about 80 to 90%.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Overall experience was great, apart from the placement. Teachers are very helpful and understanding.

content.Placements: Not a single student was placed this year from our Institute of Pharmacy. All the students had to find work on their own. Even though the institute is NBA accredited, there were no placements in 2024. The roles typically offered are for production personnel, QA, and QC personnel.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is excellent. All classrooms have large capacities and are equipped with CCTV cameras, smart classrooms, and a library full of books and computers with active Wi-Fi connections. The hostel rooms are good, and labs are equipped with the latest UV spectrophotometer and HPLC instruments. Various machines, such as disintegrating and dissolution apparatuses, are also present.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college.

content.Placements: In our college, almost 70% of students are placed in our course. The highest salary package offered is 15 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Sun Pharma, Cipla, Lupin, Zydus, Torrent, etc., visit our campus. Almost 50% of students get internships. Around 20% of students get internships at top companies.
content.Infrastructure: Labs and smart classrooms are available. An auditorium is available. There are separate hostels for girls and boys. A cafeteria, a gym, and a library are good. Medical facilities are available. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. A sports complex is available. The quality of food in the mess is good.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: There were average placement opportunities in 2020.

content.Placements: In total, 20 percent of the students were placed in my college. The highest and best package offered is about Rs.20 Lacs to 30 Lacs while the average package offered is Rs.10 to 15 Lacs and the minimum is Rs.500000.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities in our department are average. The library and classrooms are not that good. The hostel facilities are also just average but the environment of the hostel is very good.
content.Faculty: The teachers are very helpful, understandable, and knowledgeable. They have qualified at a very high level. Their teaching methods are very clear and clean. The difficulty level of semester exams is average and the pass percentage is about 80 to 90%.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: It is a high-level college, and it is not a waste of money and life.

content.Placements: Not more than 2% of the students got placed. The lowest salary offered is Rs. 1,500 per month, and the highest salary offered is Rs. 30,000 per month. No big companies are recruiting students from our course, and only inter jobs are offered in our course. There are almost negligible placements in our college.
content.Infrastructure: We have only basic things that we can get in our school. Classrooms are normal, but they can be improved. There are poor facilities of Wi-Fi and labs because most of the PCs don't work in labs. Connectivity is also limited. I don't stay in the hostel.

admission_process.title: Nityananda College of Pharmacy Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Nityananda College of Pharmacy admissionsare completely merit-based. The institute offers 3 programmes.Nityananda College of Pharmacyoffers courses across various specialisations and aspirants need to apply for courses through its official website. Nityananda College of Pharmacy admission is done based on scores of exams like Odisha CHSE, OJEE, and CBSE 12th. The university offers over 3 courses at UG and PG levels in field, such as Medicine and Health Sciences. Read more details around Nityananda College of Pharmacy admission in the following article.
At UG and PG level, B.Pharma, D.Pharma, M.Pharma, etc. are among the top courses offered at Nityananda College of Pharmacy.
